response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack experience and notable open-source contributions in geospatial systems, the candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and has no demonstrated work with navigation systems, routing tiles, or distributed systems for map data freshness and consistency — all core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Deep involvement in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with measurable impact
concerns: No evidence of commercial C++ or Rust development for routing or navigation systems
Lack of demonstrated experience with routing tile generation or map data pipelines
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required low-latency systems programming
